_note: PROVISIONAL — the geometry and chars_per_vision_token are reasonable defaults, but fidelity_scores are 0 on purpose: no real Fable-5 battery run has been done in-house yet, so this profile images NOTHING until one is. Do not hand-set these scores. Run `pxcore` against a live Fable-5 with the calibration battery, let it write the real numbers, then promote source to 'prebaked'. A score asserted without a battery run is the exact 'measured nothing' failure this product refuses to make.
